content.fact_text: Implemented OrderValidator class containing Zod schemas for checkout and pagination, including comprehensive business logic validation for order totals and SKU formats.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides static validation methods for checkout requests and pagination queries. Enforces schema constraints via Zod and business invariants for calculations. Redacts sensitive PII from request data. Throws structured ValidationErrors on failure.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, production-ready validation layer ensuring data integrity for order-related API operations, preventing malformed data from reaching the domain logic.
